roles.content: Rationalism - Descartes: A comprehensive examination of rationalism - descartes within History of Philosophy, exploring foundational concepts, key arguments, and contemporary interpretations.
Critical perspectives on rationalism - descartes: Examining objections, alternative frameworks, and limitations of dominant approaches to rationalism - descartes.
Recent developments in rationalism - descartes: Current research trends, emerging debates, and new applications of rationalism - descartes in contemporary philosophy.
